description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded. A 3D printing lab needs two models based on a mask created with the 'Bone' preset (226-3071 HU). Generate and export a 'raw' 3D surface model containing all bone fragments as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/bone_raw.stl. Then, generate and export a 'cleaned' 3D surface model containing only the largest region (main skull) as a binary STL to /home/ga/Documents/bone_cleaned.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
